name: Gf Rice Flour Yeast Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flours. Measure 2 cups into a large mixer bowl.
2. Add dry yeast, sugar, salt, baking powder, and dry milk. Mix thoroughly.
3. Combine instant mashed potatoes and hot tap water; whip lightly with a fork.
4. Add potato mixture and soft butter to the dry ingredients in the mixer bowl. Beat for 3 minutes on medium speed.
5. Add remaining flour and eggs; beat for 3 minutes on medium speed. The mixture will be like thick cake batter.
6. Leave the batter in the bowl; cover and let rise in a warm place for 1 hour. The batter will rise about 2 inches depending on the size of the bowl.
7. Beat just enough to remove large gas bubbles.
8. Preheat oven to 325°F.
9. Grease two 9 x 5 loaf pans. Pour batter into pans; cover and let rise 30 minutes.
10. Bake 30 to 35 minutes until lightly browned. Especially good toasted.
